info.title: Mujarrad Backend API
info.description: Knowledge graph and abstraction technology platform API. Provides endpoints for user authentication (local + Google OAuth2), email verification, password reset, B2B API key management, space management with project types (CONSUMER/BACKEND), space modes (CONFIGURATION/PRODUCTION) for schema governance, context types with attribute schemas and relationship definitions, universal relationship types, batch upload, node CRUD with versioning, attribute/relationship management with cycle detection and cardinality enforcement, and attribute promotion to representative graph nodes.

tags.name: Attribute Management
tags.description: Node relationship and attribute CRUD operations

tags.name: Context-Scoped Nodes
tags.description: Access nodes through their parent context

tags.name: Universal Relationship Types
tags.description: System-defined relationship types available in all spaces

tags.name: Cross-Instance Relationships
tags.description: Create relationships to nodes on federated instances

tags.name: Blank (Unorganized)
tags.description: Nodes without an explicit context — the safety net

tags.name: Authentication
tags.description: User registration, login, and JWT token operations

tags.name: Context Types
tags.description: Context type schema management for BACKEND spaces

tags.name: Federation Proxy
tags.description: Live proxy access to connected instances

get.description: Returns a specific node by its UUID

put.description: Updates an existing node. Creates a new version snapshot on each update.

delete.description: Deletes a node. Context nodes with children require force=true. Force delete uses smart cascade: deletes single-parent children, orphans multi-parent children.

parameters.name: force
parameters.description: Force delete context nodes with children

get.description: Returns a specific context type by its slug.

put.description: Updates a context type schema. Built-in types cannot be modified. Requires CONFIGURATION mode.

delete.description: Deletes a context type. Built-in types and types with existing nodes cannot be deleted. Requires CONFIGURATION mode.

409.description: Context type in use by nodes

get.summary: List context restrictions for a member

put.summary: Set context restrictions for a member

get.description: Returns a specific attribute by its UUID

put.description: Updates an existing attribute's value, name, or properties

delete.description: Deletes an attribute and its relationship. If promoted, the representative node is also removed.

post.description: Creates a new user account with username, email, and password. Returns JWT token for immediate authentication. A verification email is sent to confirm the email address.

400.description: Invalid request - validation error or duplicate email/username

post.description: Creates a new user account with username, email, and password. Returns JWT token for immediate authentication. A verification email is sent to confirm the email address.

400.description: Invalid request - validation error or duplicate email/username

post.description: Authenticates user with email and password. Returns JWT token valid for 24 hours.
Authenticates user with email and password. Returns JWT token valid for 24 hours.

get.description: Returns all spaces owned by or shared with the authenticated user

post.description: Creates a new space for the authenticated user, or returns existing space if slug already exists for this user

409.description: Space slug already taken by another user

get.description: Returns all nodes in the specified space

post.summary: Create node in space (lands in Context-Less / Blank)
Create child node inside parent (atomic — block creation)
Move node to another space (DEPRECATED — use /migrate instead)
Migrate node to another space (copies content, original stays)
Create nested context inside this context
Assign node from Blank to a context
Bulk assign nodes from Blank to a context

post.description: Promotes an attribute to a first-class graph entity (representative node). The representative node can then have its own attributes and relationships.

delete.description: Reverts a promoted attribute back to a simple property/edge by deleting its representative node. Use force=true to cascade delete children or orphan them if they have multiple parents.

parameters.name: force
parameters.description: Force demotion even if representative node has children

404.description: Attribute not found or not promoted

post.description: Upload multiple files (nodes) to a space in a single batch operation. Used by CLI for syncing Obsidian/markdown vaults. Files are sent as a JSON array in a multipart Blob.

400.description: Invalid request or malformed file data

get.description: Returns all context types defined in a space, including built-in types.

post.description: Creates a new context type schema in a BACKEND space. Requires CONFIGURATION mode.
Creates a new attribute or relationship between nodes with cardinality validation. Includes cycle detection for 'contains' relationships.

400.description: Invalid request, cycle detected, or cardinality violation

get.summary: List cross-instance relationships for a node

post.summary: Refresh cached mirror for a cross-instance link

post.description: Restores a node to a previous version (not yet implemented)

get.description: Returns all outgoing attributes and relationships from a node

post.description: Creates a new attribute or relationship between nodes. Includes cycle detection for 'contains' relationships.

get.summary: List nodes in a remote context (live proxy)

post.summary: Create a node on remote instance (live proxy, requires EDITOR scope)

post.description: Verify user's email address using the token sent via email
Reset the user's password using the token from the reset email

400.description: Invalid or expired token, or weak password

post.description: Resend the email verification link to the user's email

400.description: Email already verified or user not found

post.description: Authenticate using Google ID token obtained from Google Sign-In SDK. Creates a new user if email doesn't exist, or returns existing user.

400.description: Invalid request - missing ID token or Google account has no email

503.description: Google OAuth not configured on server

401.description: Authentication failed - invalid/expired token, audience mismatch, or unverified email

post.description: Request a password reset link. For security, always returns success even if email doesn't exist.

200.description: Password reset email sent if account exists

get.description: Get all API keys owned by authenticated user (secret keys not included)

post.description: Generate a new API key pair. Secret key is shown only once - save it immediately!

400.description: Invalid request or max keys limit reached

post.description: Generate new secret key while keeping public key unchanged (zero-downtime rotation)

get.description: Returns a specific space by its UUID. Requires membership or ownership.

404.description: Space not found or access denied

delete.description: Deletes a space and all its contents (nodes, attributes). Only the owner can delete a space.

404.description: Space not found or access denied

patch.description: Updates space properties including project type and mode. Only the owner can update a space.

404.description: Space not found or access denied

400.description: Invalid request (e.g., invalid mode for CONSUMER)

get.description: Returns the profile of the currently authenticated user
Returns the profile of the currently authenticated user
Returns all active system-defined relationship types. These are available in all spaces as a semantic vocabulary for relationships.
Returns paginated list of space templates filtered by scope and tags
Returns all nodes reachable by traversing 'contains' relationships downward. Handles cyclic graphs.
Returns all nodes reachable by traversing 'contains' relationships upward. Supports multi-parent graphs.

get.summary: List unorganized nodes in the Blank (paginated)
Count unorganized nodes in the Blank

get.description: Returns a specific space by its slug. Requires membership or ownership.

404.description: Space not found or access denied

get.description: Returns all immutable version snapshots for a node, ordered by version number
Returns a specific version snapshot including title, content, nodeDetails, and attributes at that point in time
Returns all incoming attributes and relationships where this node is the target
Returns overall health status of the application
Verifies database connectivity and executes a simple query to ensure the database is accessible and responding

get.summary: List accessible spaces on a connected instance
List nodes in a remote space (live proxy)
Get a single remote node (live proxy)

get.description: Check if a password reset token is valid before showing reset form
Get specific API key details (secret key not included)

delete.description: Permanently revoke an API key (cannot be undone)

isBuiltin.description: Whether this is a built-in node

effectiveLockLevel.description: Effective lock level (computed from space, schema, parent, self)

lockInherited.description: Whether the lock is inherited from space, schema, or parent

lockSource.description: Source of lock: space, schema, parent, self, or null

path.description: Request path that caused the error

traceId.description: Trace ID for debugging (correlation across logs)

spaceId.description: Space ID this context type belongs to

additionalProperties.description: Attribute schema defining field types and constraints

attributeSchema.description: Attribute schema defining field types and constraints

isBuiltin.description: Whether this is a system built-in type

representativeNodeId.description: Representative node ID (if attribute has been promoted)

password.description: Strong password (min 8 characters, must contain special character)

slug.description: URL-friendly slug (lowercase letters, numbers, hyphens only)

projectType.description: Project type (CONSUMER or BACKEND, defaults to CONSUMER)

organizationId.description: Organization ID (optional — defaults to user's individual organization for backward compatibility)

spaceId.description: Parent space ID (UUID) - automatically set from URL path

slug.description: URL-safe slug (optional, will be auto-generated from title if not provided)

contextTypeId.description: Context type ID for schema validation (optional, BACKEND spaces only)

sessionId.description: Session ID for tracking multi-batch uploads

errors.description: List of errors encountered during upload

batchNumber.description: Batch number in the upload session

totalProcessed.description: Total number of files processed in this batch

slug.description: URL-friendly slug (auto-generated from name if not provided)

additionalProperties.description: Attribute schema defining field types and constraints

attributeSchema.description: Attribute schema defining field types and constraints

newPassword.description: New password (min 8 chars, must include uppercase, lowercase, digit, special char)

idToken.description: ID token from OAuth provider (e.g., Google Sign-In)

OAuth2LoginRequest.description: OAuth2 login request with ID token from provider

token.description: JWT access token for subsequent API calls

mode.description: Operational mode (required for BACKEND, must be null for CONSUMER)

isActive.description: Whether this type is currently active

description.example: Basic space template for new projects

usageCount.description: Number of times template has been used

contextTemplatesCount.description: Number of context templates in this template

templates.description: List of templates in current page

totalElements.description: Total number of templates across all pages

bearerAuth.description: JWT authentication token. Obtain via: POST /api/auth/register, POST /api/auth/login, or POST /api/auth/oauth/google. Alternatively, use B2B API key authentication via X-API-Key and X-API-Secret headers.
